description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing a UAP traveling at an estimated speed of 321 knots (369 mph). The observer reported that the UAP “increased speed and changed direction towards the east.”
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D4, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: A U.S. military operator observed a possible UAP at 1258Z near grid reference 34SDG9041417044. The UAP's velocity was estimated at 321 knots, and it subsequently increased speed and changed direction towards the east. Brief observation prevented altitude estimates.
reported_behavior: Velocity estimated at 321 knots. UAP increased speed and changed direction towards the east. Brief observation precluded UAP altitude estimates.
bust_reasoning: The report describes a visual observation of an object with an estimated velocity of 321 knots that increased speed and changed direction. While this speed is notable, it is well within the capabilities of conventional aircraft or missiles. The 'brief observation' and lack of altitude estimates, combined with only a single sensor modality (visual), severely limit the ability to rule out prosaic explanations. There are no reported kinematics or signatures that resist a mundane explanation, placing it firmly in the 'modest evidence pointing toward a typical prosaic explanation' category.

GENTEXT/UAP
• Description: (S//REL) AT 1258Z, 1.4(a) OBSERVED POSS UAP IVO 34SDG9041417044. BRIEF OBSERVATION PRECLUDED UAP ALTITUDE ESTIMATES. VELOCITY ESTIMATED AT 321 KNOTS. UAP INCREASED SPEED AND CHANGED DIRECTION TOWARDS THE EAST.
PILOT: (b) (6) [redacted]
(b) (6) [redacted]

~~SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY~~
cover_up_reasoning: Four out of five pages of this document are almost entirely redacted, containing only FOIA exemption codes and '[redacted]' blocks, indicating substantial removal of information beyond routine personal data. Additionally, the pilot's name is withheld, and the document's original 'SECRET' classification suggests a high level of control over the information.
summary_zh: 一名美国军事操作员于协调世界时1258在网格参考34SDG9041417044附近观察到一个疑似UAP。该UAP的速度估计为321节，随后其速度增加并向东改变方向。由于观察时间短暂，未能估算UAP的高度。
reported_behavior_zh: 速度估计为321节。UAP速度增加并向东改变方向。由于观察时间短暂，未能估算UAP的高度。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该报告描述了对一个物体的目视观察，其估计速度为321节，并曾加速和改变方向。尽管此速度引人注目，但其完全在常规飞机或导弹的能力范围之内。“短暂观察”以及缺乏高度估算，加之仅有单一传感器模式（目视），严重限制了排除普通解释的能力。没有报告任何运动学特征或信号能够抵制普通解释，因此将其归类为“指向典型普通解释的适度证据”。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件五分之四的页面几乎完全经过编辑处理，仅包含《信息自由法》豁免代码和“[已编辑]”块，表明除了常规个人数据之外，大量信息已被删除。此外，飞行员姓名被隐瞒，且该文件最初的“SECRET”密级表明对信息的高度控制。
claims: The UAP's velocity was estimated at 321 knots
The UAP changed direction towards the east
bust_explanations: Military aircraft: The estimated velocity of 321 knots and the ability to change direction are consistent with many types of conventional military aircraft operating in the Arabian Gulf region.

Large drone (military or commercial): Advanced drones, especially military variants, can achieve speeds of 321 knots and execute directional changes, potentially appearing as an unidentified object if not immediately recognized.
Missile or rocket: A missile or rocket in flight could exhibit the reported speed and change in direction, particularly if observed from a distance without clear identifying features.
bust_explanations_zh: 军用飞机：321节的估计速度和改变方向的能力与在阿拉伯湾地区运行的多种常规军用飞机相符。
大型无人机（军用或商用）：先进无人机，特别是军用型号，能够达到321节的速度并执行方向改变，如果未能立即识别，可能表现为不明物体。
导弹或火箭：飞行中的导弹或火箭可能表现出所报告的速度和方向改变，尤其是在远距离观察且无清晰识别特征的情况下。
cover_up_indicators: Four out of five pages are almost entirely redacted with only FOIA exemption codes and '[redacted]' blocks
Document is marked 'SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY'
cover_up_indicators_zh: 五分之四的页面几乎完全经过编辑处理，仅包含《信息自由法》豁免代码和“[已编辑]”块
关键证人姓名（飞行员）被隐瞒
文件标有“SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY”密级
